feedback.text: Hello, im one of many people that would like to be able to have more control lover my digitally purchased goods. In my case this is primarily video games. As I hope you have seen the stop killing/destroying games movement has reached over 1 million signatures, and what they are describing is a wonderful starting point for figuring out how to protect digital entertainment. I would love for you to be able to help these initiatives goals to be realized, as you most likely have a lot in common when it comes to fair usage of digital products.
